title: versioning — cache keys + tags
description: Registries cached in Redis with tag-based invalidation. Cache keys on the hot path (resolver lookup) have short TTL for reactive invalidation + long TTL as a safety net.

keys.description: Full ApiVersion catalog. Loaded at boot + refreshed on state changes.
The single is_default=true version. Read on every request that falls through the resolver chain.
Per-surface transformer graph (nodes = versions, edges = transformers). Enables chain composition without repeated registry walks.
Published notices affecting a given version. Read by tenant catalog + Link: header emitter.
Per-resolver memoisation cache. Header resolver caches parsed Accept headers by request signature; webhook resolver caches (subscription_id → api_version) lookups for the dispatch batch.
Last-run cursor for the SunsetApiVersionJob scheduled command. Prevents re-scanning already-processed rows within the hour.
